name: Albert Collins
description: '''Albert Gene Collins''' (October 1, 1932 – November 24, 1993) was an American [[electric blues]] guitarist and singer with a distinctive guitar style. He was noted for his powerful playing and his use of [[Guitar tunings|altered tunings]] and a [[Capo (musical device)|capo]]. His long association with the [[Fender Telecaster]] led to the title "The Master of the Telecaster".
